/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,librobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o librobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/robot_interfaces/msg/detail/robot_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/robot_interfaces/srv/detail/update_gait_params__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/robot_interfaces/srv/detail/update_single_param__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/robot_interfaces/srv/detail/set_body_height__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
